mapper.select: SELECT id, stock_code, classification_type, sector_code, action, snap_date, created_at FROM classification_change_log WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND classification_type = #{type} ORDER BY snap_date DESC
SELECT id, stock_code, classification_type, sector_code, action, snap_date, created_at FROM classification_change_log WHERE snap_date BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY snap_date DESC
